data.title: Nvidia Unveils 'Signs' AI Platform For Teaching American Sign Language, Expanding Into Assistive Tech
data.description: Nvidia has unveiled Signs, an innovative artificial intelligence-powered platform designed to enhance American Sign Language learning.

data.title: Warren Buffett's Berkshire Hathaway Sells $116M Shares Of Dialysis Giant DaVita, Cuts Stake By 2%
data.description: Warren Buffett's investment firm, Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK.A) (NYSE: BRK.B), has offloaded a 2% stake in dialysis service provider, DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA). The transaction, executed between February 14 and 19, is valued at around $116 million.

data.title: Leaker Claims Apple's Next-Gen C2 Modem Is Already In Testing— Here's What It Means For iPhone 5G Connectivity
data.description: Apple is reportedly testing its second-generation C2 modem, marking a significant step in its effort to develop in-house wireless technology and reduce reliance on Qualcomm.

data.title: Elon Musk-Led SpaceX Likely To Undertake Starship's 8th Test Flight On Feb 26: Here's What We Know
data.description: Elon Musk's rocket manufacturing company SpaceX is eyeing Feb. 26 for the next test flight of its Starship launch vehicle.

data.title: Dogecoin 'Millionaire' Pushes 'Conviction Plays' Like PEPE Like There's No Tomorrow: 'Best Time To Start Buying'
data.description: Glauber Contessoto, popularly known as SlumDOGE Millionaire, advocated buying  ‘conviction plays’ like frog-themed Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) on Thursday, amid a broader slump in the meme coin market.
